DROP TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_PROMOTER_PERFORMANCE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_PROMOTER_PERFORMANCE]
( 
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PromoterID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadCount] [int]  NULL,
	[EarliestLeadEntryDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [EarliestLeadEntryDate] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
